polishes.before: She just wants somewhere cozy and not wet.
polishes.after: She just wants somewhere warm and not wet.

polishes.before: Her heart aches deep within her.
polishes.after: Her heart aches deep inside her.

polishes.before: Not a single person walks past the alley.
polishes.after: Not one person walks past the alley.

polishes.before: In order to reach the small furry one.
polishes.after: In order to reach the cat.

polishes.before: She takes out a gentle drying cloth.
polishes.after: She takes out a gentle towel.

polishes.before: She cannot haul the small furry creature house.
polishes.after: She cannot haul the cat house.

polishes.before: For making music side by side.
polishes.after: For singing side by side.

polishes.before: Grandma says, "One more story this evening."
polishes.after: Grandma says, "Another story this evening."

polishes.before: Long ago, the north wind and the sun fell into a long talk-fight.
polishes.after: Long ago, the north wind and the sun had a long argument.

polishes.before: The volume with the sky-toned cover.
polishes.after: The volume with the blue cover.

polishes.before: We both look at Grandma. She is about to set off on.
polishes.after: We both look at Grandma. She is about to begin.

polishes.before: For her partner to enjoy.
polishes.after: For her partner to like.

polishes.before: She rose up the peach out of the water.
polishes.after: She rose up the peach from the water.

polishes.before: Twelve-month span passed. He was now a young man.
polishes.after: Years passed. He was now a young man.

polishes.before: Both fast and sharp-minded.
polishes.after: Both fast and clever.

polishes.before: Go up the stone barrier.
polishes.after: Go up the wall.

polishes.before: Leaf-toned and shiny.
polishes.after: Green and shiny.

polishes.before: Broad and sky-toned.
polishes.after: Broad and blue.

polishes.before: A tall barrier of dark metal.
polishes.after: A tall barrier of iron.

polishes.before: For unlocking the door from within.
polishes.after: For unlocking the door from inside.
polishes.correct: to open the gate from inside

polishes.before: For keeping eyes on the bad ones.
polishes.after: For watching the bad ones.

polishes.before: Momotaro and his friends sailed home rich and head-high.
polishes.after: Momotaro and his friends sailed home rich and very pleased.

polishes.before: A shepherd boy watched wool beasts on the hill.
polishes.after: A shepherd boy watched flock on the hill.

polishes.before: Then one day, a true gray hunter came.
polishes.after: Then one day, a true wolf came.

polishes.before: I leap off the stone barrier and walk home in the moonlight.
polishes.after: I leap off the wall and walk home in the moonlight.

polishes.before: Grandma says, "Because pups are always-by-side pals, like you."
polishes.after: Grandma says, "Because pups are loyal pals, like you."

polishes.before: Mochi asks, "Was the young lad true?"
polishes.after: Mochi asks, "Was the boy true?"

polishes.before: Hana asks, "Why carried out the pink round fruit ride the water?"
polishes.after: Hana asks, "Why did the pink round fruit ride the water?"

polishes.before: Grandma says, "Peaches are full of breath stuff within. Breath stuff is glow than water."
polishes.after: Grandma says, "Peaches are full of air inside. Air is glow than water."

polishes.before: I am still within my shell-ball.
polishes.after: I am still inside my egg.
